listening.title: Listening: Giving directions
listening.transcript: Turn left at the corner, then go straight. That building is the library. Those shops are open until 9 p.m. The station is not far from here.

listening.title: Listening: Review — A short trip
listening.transcript: I am from a small town. There is a small house near my hometown with a beautiful garden. There is a park opposite the supermarket. The school is between the bank and the post office.

questions.question: Where is the park?
options: Between the bank and the post office
questions.explanation: "There is a park opposite the supermarket."

questions.question: The school is ___ the bank and the post office.
questions.explanation: "The school is between the bank and the post office."
